channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLmoneyAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLmoneyAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How to spot the silent fees and hidden costs your adviser isn’t mentioning
item.description: From revenue-sharing ‘kickbacks’ to advisory fees on idle cash, here are the two questions you need to ask to protect your returns.

item.title: Watch for these 21 best-in-class stocks to keep powering the tech rally, analysts advise
item.description: Expect the push higher for tech stocks to keep going, says Barclays as Wall Street gets on board. They flag their favorite picks across tech sectors.

item.title: UPS leaves full-year outlook intact even as quarterly earnings top target, and stock falls
item.description: UPS’s stock falls after quarterly revenue beats expectations, but the full-year outlook was kept unchanged.

item.title: What Paul Tudor Jones is warning us against doing as the S&P 500 hits record heights
item.description: Jones is concerned about excess leverage in the system, about the S&P valuations and a deluge of equity supply but he does sense an opportunity in Jap...
